_meta.what: Machine-readable reference-trajectory oracle for the DYN format — the validation set for engine/dyn-score.py.
_meta.source_items: items/seed_DYN_dynamics.md (5 L3 reference solutions seeded SenseRun #9)
_meta.convention: Each item declares the qualitative behavior MODE plus features {overshoot, oscillation, delay_dominant, eventual_direction(vs the start: higher|lower|same|collapse)}. A response is graded by matching mode + features (Structure §3.1 'reference trajectory match'). trap_mode = the intuitive wrong trajectory (usually a smooth/monotonic approach); predicting it caps the score low.
_meta.scoring: Deterministic trajectory sub-score only. The mechanism/quality (jury) sub-score is UNCALIBRATED -- not scored (no DYN gold; fail-closed, Structure 5.1). This oracle scores NO jury number.

DYN-FISH-001.trap: Predicting the fleet and catch rise smoothly to a new sustainable steady state (stock stabilizes at maximum sustainable yield) -- ignoring the boat-entry delay + sunk-cost effort that make the fleet overshoot regeneration and crash the stock.

DYN-SHOWER-002.trap: Predicting temperature converges smoothly (and faster if the person reacts harder) to comfortable -- ignoring that the pipe DELAY plus high reaction gain produces overshoot and oscillation, and that reacting harder makes the oscillation WORSE, not better (wrong-direction intuition).

DYN-ADOPT-003.trap: Predicting growth keeps compounding exponentially ('hockey stick forever') from the marketing blitz -- ignoring the finite addressable market (limits to growth) that bends word-of-mouth growth into an S-curve saturating at market size.

DYN-CAPTRAP-004.trap: Predicting mandated overtime raises output to a new higher steady state -- ignoring the delayed erosion of capability (burnout, attrition, skill loss) that pulls output back DOWN below where it started (fixes-that-fail / capability trap).

DYN-CLIMATE-005.trap: Predicting that a 50% emissions cut stabilizes (or lowers) atmospheric CO2 at today's level -- the canonical stock-flow misperception: while emissions (inflow) still exceed absorption (outflow), the CO2 STOCK keeps rising (more slowly) toward a higher plateau, and temperature lags further behind.
